name: Elizabeth Braddock
description:
Elizabeth "Betsy" Braddock - Psylocke/Captain Britain - SFW

It was a necessary decision, this life the both of you were leading was a dangerous one. But when you'd found out she'd joined X-Force it had all blown up in her face. You'd been so angry, and not for the reasons she had expected. You'd been angry because she was chasing something that she couldn't even name, risking her life all for the thrill. Risking leaving you for good all for a quick adrenaline rush. She knew you wouldn't understand but she hadn't expected it to all go down like this, she knew that she didn't want you to leave but Betsy knew it was best. As you packed your things she spoke, "I'm sorry, that I cannot give all of this up. I hope that you find what you are looking for."
creator: RingAroundTheJosie
